recommendations.title: Spree
recommendations.overview: Desperate for an online following, a rideshare driver has figured out a deadly plan to go viral and he will stop at nothing to get his five minutes of fame.

recommendations.title: Battle of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Following a deadly viral outbreak, private military soldier Max Gatling leads a handful of survivors and a ragtag band of robots against an army of the infected.

recommendations.title: Soulcatcher
recommendations.overview: A military contractor hired to seize a weapon that turns people into savage killers seeks revenge when his brother falls victim to the device.

recommendations.title: Mercy
recommendations.overview: An ex-military doctor finds herself in a deadly battle for survival when the Irish mafia seize control of the hospital at which she works. When her son is taken hostage, she is forced to rely upon her battle-hardened past and lethal skills after real

recommendations.title: Patlabor 2: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A Japanese police unit who use giant anthropomorphic robots (called Labors) is caught up in a political struggle between the civilian authorities and the military when a terrorist act is blamed on an Air Force jet. With the aid of a government agent,

Due to political pressure from the American public, the Air Force has decided to allow two well-known reporters limited access to the most secretive base on the planet. But when one of the base’s “long-term visitors” exploits this unprecedented visit

recommendations.title: Firebird
recommendations.overview: At the height of the Cold War, a troubled soldier forms a forbidden love triangle with a daring fighter pilot and his female comrade amid the dangerous surroundings of a Soviet Air Force Base.

recommendations.title: Battle of Britain
recommendations.overview: In 1940, the Royal Air Force fights a desperate battle against the might of the Luftwaffe for control of the skies over Britain, thus preventing an attempted Nazi invasion.

recommendations.title: Operation Christmas Drop
recommendations.overview: While gathering evidence to support closing a tropical U.S. Air Force base, a congressional aide warms to its generous captain.

recommendations.title: Terminal Velocity
recommendations.overview: A maverick skydiver and a former KGB agent team up to stop the Russian mafia from stealing gold.
